metadata.description: A collection of simple but powerful Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: claude-md-discovery-extended
plugins.description: Auto-discovers and loads CLAUDE.md files from any directory outside your project tree when the model accesses files there.

plugins.name: codex-context-loader
plugins.description: Dynamically injects detailed Codex plugin context into sessions only when the Codex plugin is enabled.

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: An adversarial code/plan reviewer that uses a Codex-style review contract while reviewing only the exact slice you name.

plugins.name: fix-docstrings
plugins.description: Audits Python files for Google-style docstring compliance and fixes violations. A hook injects parser-safe rules just-in-time when the files being fixed define LangChain @tool functions.
